commands.name: blackjack
commands.summary: Play blackjack — solo vs the dealer, or challenge a player (stakes escrowed).

commands.name: bjtournament
commands.summary: Start a Blackjack tournament (registration + private round channels).

commands.name: bjstart
commands.summary: Manually start a pending Blackjack tournament early.

body.text: Beat the dealer without going over 21. Free play wins pay a fixed reward; bets pay 1:1 (naturals 3:2). Challenge a player with `!blackjack @player [bet]` — stakes are escrowed when the challenge is accepted.

settings.hint: Default entry fee (🪙 coins) applied when an admin runs `!bjtournament` without an explicit entry_fee argument.
settings.name: default_entry_fee

commands.summary: Reset a counting channel to its starting state.

commands.summary: Show a counting channel's mode + state.

commands.summary: Toggle reset-to-start on a wrong count.

body.text: Run counting matches in this channel: pick a mode below to enable counting HERE, or use `!start_match <mode> [args]` (multiples/custom modes take arguments). Wrong numbers are removed; ✅ marks accepted counts.

selectors.placeholder: Enable Here — pick a counting mode

commands.name: catch
commands.summary: Hunt a wild creature — rarity-weighted encounter, level-nudged catch roll.

body.text: Hunt wild creatures — rarity drives both how often they appear and how hard they are to catch. Your creature level (shared game XP) nudges the odds.

commands.name: dm_challenge
commands.summary: Challenge another user to a deathmatch duel.

body.text: Turn-based duels: 100 HP each, attack for 15 (30 on a crit), defend to halve the next hit. Challenge a player with `!deathmatch @user` — PvP wins count on the leaderboard. **Fight Bot** starts an immediate duel vs the bot (results stay off the leaderboard).

settings.hint: Seconds each player has to respond on their turn before the duel times out and the opponent wins by default.
settings.name: turn_timeout

commands.name: diagnostics
commands.summary: Platform status: lifecycle, findings, declarations, AI health.

body.text: Platform status from the kernel truth sources (lifecycle, findings ring, declaration registry, AI collector).

commands.name: economy
commands.summary: Open the Economy hub (daily, work, shop, balance).

commands.name: daily
commands.summary: Claim your daily reward. Higher streaks unlock better odds!

commands.name: work
commands.summary: Work a job and earn coins + XP (1 h cooldown).

commands.name: shop
commands.summary: Browse and buy items from the shop.

commands.name: balance
commands.summary: Show your (or another user's) current coin balance.

commands.name: joblist
commands.summary: Show all jobs, requirements, and your mastery.

body.text: Daily rewards, jobs, the item shop, and transfers — every coin movement rides the audited seam and the economy_audit_log money trail.

Choose a job below.
Pay increases **+1%** each time you work the same job (max +100%).

selectors.empty_state: ❌ No jobs available. Earn XP or buy items from 🛒 Shop.

body.text: Buy items to unlock higher-tier jobs. Purchases are unique — one of each per member.

settings.hint: Live feed of daily rewards, work earnings, transfers, and shop purchases.
settings.name: log_channel

settings.description: Operator-facing audit channel for economy mutations. Recommended for any guild that runs the economy actively.

commands.name: farm
commands.summary: Open your idle chicken farm — collect eggs, buy hens, upgrade the coop.

body.text: Your idle farm — hens lay eggs while you're away. Collect eggs for coins, buy hens to lay faster, and upgrade the coop to hold more.

commands.name: fish
commands.summary: Cast a line — one instant catch roll.

commands.name: fishlog
commands.summary: Your fish dex — every species you've caught.

commands.name: sail
commands.summary: Set sail to the deepwater venue.

body.text: Cast a line — 21 species across 7 size bands; level up to unlock bigger fish. Caught fish land in your pack (sell or cook them); the biggest of each species is your trophy.

commands.name: games
commands.summary: Open the Games hub — competitive games and channel activities.

commands.name: world
commands.summary: Open the Explore world hub — the open-world town square.

commands.name: worldcard
commands.summary: Show your cross-game world card — global level + per-game standing.

body.text: Competitive games and channel activities. Wagered games escrow stakes when a challenge is accepted; your cross-game progress lives on the shared world track (`!worldcard`).
The open-world town square. Each game keeps its own ladder; your shared world level derives from the game-XP pool. Game worlds (Mine · Fish · Farm · Creatures) dock here as their bands land.
